title: Phase 3 & 4 (Billing Schema Cleanup)
description:
## Summary
- Extracted billing invoice blobs to new `billing_invoice_documents` table.
- Removed redundant `paid_at`, `paid_amount`, `dunning_level`, `last_dunning_at` from `billing_invoices`.
- Added `v_billing_invoices_with_state` view for dynamic state calculation.
- Added `customers_id` FK to `billing_customers`.

## Test plan
- [x] task test:all
- [x] task workspace:validate (via test:all)
- [x] Documentation updated

Closes T000375
